debrief.title: RSI With Post-Induction Hypotension
debrief.teachingFeedback: This case tests RSI sequencing, post-induction hypotension recognition, and early airway confirmation. All critical actions were completed without dangerous behavior. Time to treatment: 14s.
teachingPoints: Propofol decreases SVR and myocardial contractility, causing hypotension — expect it and be ready.
EtCO2 confirmation is the standard of care after intubation.
Phenylephrine is useful when hypotension is primarily vasodilation with adequate heart rate.
Ephedrine suits hypotension with bradycardia or low cardiac output.
